description: Self-updating documentation — parses source code, package.json scripts, and Git history to auto-generate AGENCY-RULES.md updates and CHANGELOG.md entries

sync.description: Full documentation sync: parse scripts, update rules, generate changelog

options.--dry-run: Show what would change without modifying files
options.--scripts-only: Only update the Scripts Reference table in AGENCY-RULES.md
options.--changelog-only: Only generate changelog from Git history

scripts_reference.description: Parse .agency/scripts/ for JSDoc @desc and @param comments to auto-generate the Scripts Reference table

package_scripts.description: Parse jengabooks/package.json scripts section to ensure AGENCY-RULES.md has matching entries

git_changelog.description: Read Git log since last tag and append structured changelog entry to CHANGELOG.md

integrationPoints: Include as a required step in release-manager's workflow before cutting a new version
Can be run standalone via `agency docs --sync`
Respects DRY-RUN mode for review before execution
